str.notes: Suspicious Transaction Reports must be filed within 5 working days of forming suspicion. BSP-registered VASPs are covered persons under the Anti-Money Laundering Act (RA 9160, as amended by RA 11521). Filed via AMLC's electronic reporting system.

ctr.notes: Covered Transaction Reports (CTR) required for transactions exceeding PHP 500,000 within one business day. Must be filed within 5 working days.
